scripts.dev: concurrently --names "🧩 CLIENT 🧩,🤖 BACKEND 🤖" --prefix "[{name}]" --timestamp --timestamp-format "HH:mm:ss" --prefix-colors "yellow,green" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development next dev" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development CONCURRENTLY=true nodemon --quiet ../backendJS/src/server.js"
scripts.build: concurrently --names "🧩 CLIENT  🧩,🤖 BACKEND 🤖" --prefix "[{name}]" --timestamp --timestamp-format "HH:mm:ss" --prefix-colors "yellow,green" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development next build" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development CONCURRENTLY=true nodemon --quiet ../backendJS/src/server.js"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "🧩 CLIENT  🧩,🤖 BACKEND 🤖" --prefix "[{name}]" --timestamp --timestamp-format "HH:mm:ss" --prefix-colors "yellow,green" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development next start" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development CONCURRENTLY=true nodemon --quiet ../backendJS/src/server.js"
